allow: PowerShell(Write-Output "=== project skills ==="; Get-ChildItem -Path "d:\\AS_Project\\apphotrochuandaura\\.claude\\skills" -Directory -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name; Write-Output "=== user skills ==="; Get-ChildItem -Path "$env:USERPROFILE\\.claude\\skills" -Directory -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name; Write-Output "=== plugins config ==="; Get-Content "$env:USERPROFILE\\.claude\\plugins\\config.json" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Output "=== plugin repos ==="; Get-ChildItem -Path "$env:USERPROFILE\\.claude\\plugins" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name; Write-Output "=== search mattpocock ==="; Get-ChildItem -Path "$env:USERPROFILE\\.claude","d:\\AS_Project\\apphotrochuandaura\\.claude" -Recurse -Filter "SKILL.md" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object FullName -First 50)

PowerShell(Write-Output "=== ~/.claude contents ==="; Get-ChildItem -Path "$env:USERPROFILE\\.claude" -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name, Mode; Write-Output "=== plugins tree ==="; Get-ChildItem -Path "$env:USERPROFILE\\.claude\\plugins" -Recurse -Depth 2 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object FullName; Write-Output "=== settings files mention mattpocock/marketplace ==="; Get-ChildItem -Path "$env:USERPROFILE\\.claude","d:\\AS_Project\\apphotrochuandaura" -Recurse -Include "settings.json","settings.local.json","config.json" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { Write-Output "--- $\($_.FullName\) ---"; Get-Content $_.FullName -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue })

PowerShell(Write-Output "=== user skills ==="; Get-ChildItem -Path "$env:USERPROFILE\\.claude\\skills" -Recurse -Filter "SKILL.md" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object FullName; Write-Output "=== project skills ==="; Get-ChildItem -Path "d:\\AS_Project\\apphotrochuandaura\\.claude\\skills" -Recurse -Filter "SKILL.md" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object FullName; Write-Output "=== commands ==="; Get-ChildItem -Path "$env:USERPROFILE\\.claude\\commands","d:\\AS_Project\\apphotrochuandaura\\.claude\\commands" -Recurse -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object FullName; Write-Output "=== plugins dir ==="; Get-ChildItem -Path "$env:USERPROFILE\\.claude\\plugins" -Recurse -Depth 3 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object FullName)
